message:
feat(mux-server): wire jemalloc as default allocator via frankenterm-alloc

Add jemalloc feature flag (default=on) to frankenterm-mux-server, pulling in
frankenterm-alloc to replace the system allocator. This targets memory
fragmentation observed in long-running mux-server processes (76GB RSS after
23 days). Includes a compile-time test asserting the allocator backend
matches the feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,11 +13,16 @@ publish = false
 name = "frankenterm-mux-server"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
+[features]
+default = ["jemalloc"]
+jemalloc = ["dep:frankenterm-alloc", "frankenterm-alloc/jemalloc"]
+
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
 async_ossl.workspace = true
 clap.workspace = true
 config.workspace = true
+frankenterm-alloc = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 libc.workspace = true
 log.workspace = true
 mux.workspace = true
